name: Thai Red Curry Chicken and Vegetables
intro: The key to this chicken curry is to get the complex flavors. For vegetables, I like to use peanuts, sweet red peppers, and water chestnuts

ingredients.item: Cubed boneless skinless chicken breast - 1 ½ pounds

method: Place chicken in an oiled 8-inch square baking dish.
In a small bowl, combine coconut milk, curry, and salt. Pour over chicken.

Place the chicken in an oven-safe dish and cover it. Bake the chicken in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 18-22 minutes, or until it is fully cooked and reaches the desired internal temperature. While the chicken is baking, prepare the vegetables according to the package directions, ensuring they are cooked to perfection.
Serve the chicken (Step 3) with rice and vegetables (Step 4).
